name: Assembla
description: Assembla — Cloud code hosting and project management platform with Git/SVN repos, tickets, and CI webhooks.

seo.title: Assembla — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Assembla: Assembla — Cloud code hosting and project management platform with Git/SVN repos, tickets, and CI webhooks.

when_to_use: Cloud Git/SVN hosting with built-in code review
Merge-request workflows for distributed dev teams

pros: Hosts Git, SVN, and Perforce under one roof
Strong SOC2 and compliance story for enterprises
Tickets and repos tied together cleanly
Decent option for legacy SVN shops
cons: Pricing is opaque and steep vs GitHub/GitLab
CI is only via webhooks, not first-class
review.verdict: Niche enterprise forge worth it mainly if you still run Perforce or SVN and need SOC2.
review.best_for: Regulated enterprises with mixed SVN/Perforce/Git repos needing compliance hosting.
review.not_for: Modern teams on Git who would rather use GitHub or GitLab.
